markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on a new content strategy to resolve technical accuracy concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/x5xdEnynMCcfqXL9V-WNkxzQYzbJcKc7?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Strategy:** Pivot to Top-of-Funnel (TOFU) content for one month. This will increase publishing velocity by reducing the need for intensive technical review.](https://fathom.video/share/x5xdEnynMCcfqXL9V-WNkxzQYzbJcKc7?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [**Accuracy Target:** Rimkus requires \~90% accuracy for content to be publishable without expert review. This is the new baseline GrowthX will work toward.](https://fathom.video/share/x5xdEnynMCcfqXL9V-WNkxzQYzbJcKc7?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
  - [**BES Content:** The current BES content strategy is effective. GrowthX will refine its research process to fix recent factual errors, which should resolve Nohora's concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/x5xdEnynMCcfqXL9V-WNkxzQYzbJcKc7?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [**Volume Increase:** The weekly article count will increase from 5 to 7, enabled by the lower-effort TOFU approach. Rimkus will provide the new topic distribution.](https://fathom.video/share/x5xdEnynMCcfqXL9V-WNkxzQYzbJcKc7?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)

## Topics

### The Accuracy Problem

  - [**Root Cause:** Rimkus cannot publish content with factual errors, as it undermines their credibility.](https://fathom.video/share/x5xdEnynMCcfqXL9V-WNkxzQYzbJcKc7?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [**Impact:** The current review process is a bottleneck, creating a publishing backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/x5xdEnynMCcfqXL9V-WNkxzQYzbJcKc7?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
  - [**BES vs. Forensics:**](https://fathom.video/share/x5xdEnynMCcfqXL9V-WNkxzQYzbJcKc7?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
      - [**BES:** The strategy is sound, but recent factual errors require a process fix.](https://fathom.video/share/x5xdEnynMCcfqXL9V-WNkxzQYzbJcKc7?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
      - [**Forensics:** The content is too technical, requiring expert review. A refreshed article by expert Alan Conway was deemed inaccurate, highlighting the issue.](https://fathom.video/share/x5xdEnynMCcfqXL9V-WNkxzQYzbJcKc7?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)

### The Solution: Pivot to TOFU Content

  - [**Rationale:** TOFU content (e.g., "common causes of fire accidents") is less technical and easier to get right, enabling faster publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/x5xdEnynMCcfqXL9V-WNkxzQYzbJcKc7?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [**Trade-off:** This approach prioritizes reach over direct lead generation. It may not tell the "Rimkus story" as effectively as detailed, bottom-of-funnel content.](https://fathom.video/share/x5xdEnynMCcfqXL9V-WNkxzQYzbJcKc7?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
  - [**Experiment:** The team will test this TOFU-only approach for one month to measure its impact on traffic and conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/x5xdEnynMCcfqXL9V-WNkxzQYzbJcKc7?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [**Future State:** If successful, the strategy may evolve into a hybrid model, with experts reviewing a smaller volume of high-value, bottom-of-funnel content.](https://fathom.video/share/x5xdEnynMCcfqXL9V-WNkxzQYzbJcKc7?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/x5xdEnynMCcfqXL9V-WNkxzQYzbJcKc7?tab=summary&timestamp=1815.0)
      - [Refine the research process to meet the \~90% accuracy target.](https://fathom.video/share/x5xdEnynMCcfqXL9V-WNkxzQYzbJcKc7?tab=summary&timestamp=1815.0)
      - [Produce 7 TOFU articles/week for the one-month experiment.](https://fathom.video/share/x5xdEnynMCcfqXL9V-WNkxzQYzbJcKc7?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)
  - [**Rimkus:**](https://fathom.video/share/x5xdEnynMCcfqXL9V-WNkxzQYzbJcKc7?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
      - [Provide TOFU topic ideas for the Forensics division.](https://fathom.video/share/x5xdEnynMCcfqXL9V-WNkxzQYzbJcKc7?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
      - [Deliver the new weekly topic distribution (BES, Forensics, etc.) for the 7-article volume.](https://fathom.video/share/x5xdEnynMCcfqXL9V-WNkxzQYzbJcKc7?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/x5xdEnynMCcfqXL9V-WNkxzQYzbJcKc7?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)
      - [Reconvene in one month to review experiment results and decide on the next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/x5xdEnynMCcfqXL9V-WNkxzQYzbJcKc7?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)
